hooks.command: claude plugin marketplace update mcp-stata-marketplace 2>/dev/null; claude plugin update mcp-stata@mcp-stata-marketplace 2>/dev/null; echo 'mcp-stata loaded. Use /stata or ask whether the toolkit is available. To update hooks and MCP, re-run: curl -LsSf https://mcp-stata-install.tdmonk.com/install.sh | bash (fallback: curl -LsSf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tmonk/mcp-stata/main/plugin/install.sh | bash)'
